title: Best alternatives research

findings.subject: Agent memory/shared brain recommendation
findings.finding: Git-backed Obsidian/markdown as primary human/source brain; Qdrant as derived semantic index; Neo4j as derived relationship graph after schemas stabilize

findings.subject: Agent orchestration recommendation
findings.finding: Custom Hermes routing + GitHub Issues/Actions control plane; n8n for external event glue; LangGraph only for app-specific deterministic agent flows
findings.recommended_action: Keep GitHub as truth; use n8n only for triggers/integrations.

findings.subject: Persistent KB recommendation
findings.finding: Obsidian/markdown + Git + Qdrant RAG; avoid Notion as source-of-truth lock-in for CompanyOS
findings.recommended_action: Create canonical vault and indexing pipeline.

findings.subject: Secret management recommendation
findings.finding: Infisical or Vault for organization/runtime secrets; GitHub Secrets for CI; env-only only bootstrap
findings.recommended_action: Start with Infisical/Vault decision and migration runbook.

findings.subject: Unified observability recommendation
findings.finding: Grafana + Prometheus/Loki/Tempo for infra; Langfuse for LLM traces; /migration/audit as founder-facing report
findings.recommended_action: Deploy Grafana stack only after source collectors are stable.

recommended_action: Adopt recommendations as CompanyOS architecture decisions with install issues.
